context: Verify the agent completes first-time setup (authentication + library) then queries a notebook for a research topic with proper follow-up.

checklist.name: Authentication status checked first
checklist.description: The agent runs auth_manager.py status as the very first action before any notebook or query operations.

checklist.name: Auth setup run with browser-visible warning
checklist.description: The agent runs auth_manager.py setup and explicitly tells the user that a browser window will open for Google login.

checklist.name: Notebook added or activated before querying
checklist.description: The agent adds or activates the ML research notebook before issuing any question.

checklist.name: run.py wrapper used for every script invocation
checklist.description: Every script call goes through python ./scripts/run.py — no direct script execution.

checklist.name: Follow-up mechanism applied
checklist.description: After receiving the first answer about attention mechanisms, the agent checks completeness and issues follow-ups if needed.

checklist.name: Synthesised response delivered to user
checklist.description: The agent combines all query results into a coherent answer before replying to the user.
